subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Thy letter arrived and its purport was made known. While thou wert in the Sacred Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق نامه رسید و مضمون معلوم گردید در وقتیکه در بقعه مبارکه بودید
subcodes.subjects: @unity of governments; political unity, @relationship between government and people, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
